questionHtml: Natural forests in the area around Mangalore contain hardwood trees such as teak, Tectona grandis, which are deciduous, shedding their leaves once a year. Suggest, with a reason, when this might happen.
markschemeHtml:
a. dry season/Jan/Feb ✔

b. «drop leaves» to prevent water loss/transpiration «since no rainfall for almost four months» ✔
